title: Probability Coverage (ProbCover)
text_0: **Idea:** selects `batch_size` unlabeled points to maximize empirical coverage under a fixed radius `delta` in the embedding space, treating points within `delta` of any labeled sample as already covered and greedily adding the candidate samples that covers the most new samples at each step. It chooses `delta` via a purity criterion estimated from unlabeled data, prioritizes dense regions, and does not use predictive uncertainty.
